# Moon

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Moon;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Moon { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
dark, night

## Categories
accessibility
